alerts.title: LinkedIn Analytics API Error — Both Windows Failed
alerts.meta: LinkedIn 400: Missing facet (serviceErrorCode: 3). Current 7-day (2026-03-02 → 2026-03-09) and prior 7-day (2026-02-23 → 2026-03-02) analytics calls both returned errors. All per-campaign metrics are unavailable. KPIs sourced from most recent history snapshot (2026-03-09).

alerts.title: CTR Drop: -18.4% vs Prior Period (History)
alerts.meta: avgCtr at 0.58% with a recorded -18.4% delta. Exceeds the >15% drop threshold. Per-campaign CTR breakdown unavailable until API is restored.

alerts.title: CPL Spike: +24.7% vs Prior Period (History)
alerts.meta: avgCpl at Rs 126.1 with a recorded +24.7% delta. Exceeds the >20% spike threshold. Per-campaign CPL breakdown unavailable until API is restored.

alerts.title: Lead Volume Down: -11.8% vs Prior Period (History)
alerts.meta: totalLeads at 34 with a -11.8% delta. Conversion rate decline warrants monitoring once API data is restored.

opportunities.title: Restore Analytics Access — Unlock Full Optimisation
opportunities.meta: Both analytics API calls failed with a Missing Facet error (serviceErrorCode 3). Resolving this immediately will re-enable per-campaign CTR, CPL, frequency, and lead data, unblocking all bid, budget, and creative optimisations.

opportunities.title: History Shows 34 Leads at Rs 126.1 CPL — Strong Baseline to Build From
opportunities.meta: Despite the API outage, history confirms consistent lead volume. Once analytics are restored, focus budget on highest-converting campaigns to drive CPL back toward prior lows.
